Lanka city burning, palaces collapsing, giants flee in terror
Ravana laments Indrajit's death by Lakshmana, questions Lakshmana's might
Ravana prepares for battle after Indrajit's death, gathers army
Ravana charges into battle against Rama, vows revenge
Ravana fights Vibhishana, Lakshmana intervenes, drawing Ravana's wrath
Rama laments over seemingly dead Lakshmana, feels despair
Indra sends divine chariot and Matali to aid Rama in battle
Matali advises Rama to worship the Sun God for success
Rama and Ravana duel, Rama splits Ravana's banner
Ravana's furious attack shakes worlds, Gods pray for Rama's victory
Matali advises Rama to use the Brahmastra against Ravana
Vibhishana laments over his dead brother Ravana
Ravana's wives lament and weep over his dead body
Mandodari laments Ravana's death, attributes it to Vishnu
Gods celebrate Ravana's death in heaven, praise Rama and allies
Hanuman tells Sita of Rama's victory and Ravana's death
Rama asks Vibhishana to bring Sita after she prepares herself
Rama declares his honor cleared, task done, enemy slain to Sita
Sita defends her innocence and faithfulness to Rama, blames fate
Gods question Rama about Sita's fire test, reveal his divinity
Agni presents purified Sita to Rama, declares her faithfulness
Gods praise Rama, urge his return to Ayodhya and fulfillment of duties
Rama asks Indra to revive dead Vanars, Indra grants boon
Rama rejects luxuries, eager to return to Bharat and Ayodhya
Rama departs Lanka on Pushpaka Vimana, bids farewell to allies
Rama points out Lanka, battlefield, and sea from Pushpaka Vimana
Rama asks Bharadvaja about Ayodhya, Bharadvaja praises Bharat's loyalty
Rama sends Hanuman ahead to inform Guha and Bharat of his return
Hanuman recounts Rama's adventures and Sita's abduction to Guha
Shatrughna orders grand welcome preparations for Rama's return
Bharat returns kingdom to Rama, urges consecration ceremony
